title: Netflix Recommendation & Streaming: Data, Metrics, and A/B Testing
short_description: How Netflix uses completion rate, play-delay, and sequential A/B testing—with real resources from Netflix Tech Blog and industry.

title: Spotify Playlist & Music Discovery: Skip Rate, Diversity, and User Satisfaction
short_description: How Spotify uses skip behavior, playlist diversity, and discovery satisfaction—backed by Spotify Research and PLOS One.

title: Quick Commerce & Last-Mile Logistics: Route Optimization and Demand Forecasting

title: Bank Fraud Detection: Transaction Monitoring and Anomaly Detection

title: Loan Prediction & Credit Default: BFSI Analytics and Scorecards
